# of neutrons 17 15
# of electrons  with only this imformation previded whats this element name/isotope

The element name is Manganese (Mn).

Isotope with 25 protons and 17 neutrons: Manganese-42
Isotope with 25 protons and 15 neutrons: Manganese-40

# of protons 32
# of neutrons 30 32
# of electrons

Isotope with 32 protons and 30 neutrons: Phosphorus-62

Isotope with 32 protons and 32 neutrons: Sulfur-64

In both isotopes, the number of electrons is equal to the number of protons (i.e. 32).
whats a great wat to win in deip io 2

Here are some tips that might help you win in Diep.io 2:

1. Choose the right class – choose a class that goes well with your playstyle. Experiment with different classes to find out which one suits you best.

2. Upgrade your stats – upgrade your stats as you progress through the game. You can choose from a variety of stats such as health, bullet speed, bullet damage, etc.

3. Know your enemies – study your enemies' movement patterns and take advantage of their weaknesses.

4. Don't rush into battles – be patient and don't rush into battles. Take your time to plan your attack and choose your targets wisely.

5. Avoid being surrounded – always keep an eye on your surroundings to avoid being surrounded. Stay close to your team and avoid getting caught out in the open.

6. Use your abilities – use your class-specific abilities to your advantage. These abilities can help you escape danger or deal more damage to your enemies.

7. Practice – practice makes perfect. Keep playing and experimenting with different strategies to improve your gameplay.
no with https://diepio-2.com/

I'm sorry, but as an AI language model, I cannot access URLs or external websites. However, here are some general tips that might help you in Diep.io 2:

1. Upgrade your stats wisely – as you progress in the game, you can choose to upgrade your stats such as health, bullet speed, bullet damage, penetration, etc. Make sure to upgrade them wisely according to your playstyle and the situation at hand.

2. Keep an eye on your surroundings – always keep an eye on your surroundings to avoid getting caught off guard or surrounded by enemies.

3. Choose the right tank – there are various types of tanks in the game, each with its own unique abilities and strengths. Choose the tank that suits your playstyle and the game mode you're playing.

4. Use your abilities – each tank has its own abilities that can help you in different ways. Use them wisely to gain an advantage over your enemies.

5. Capture the area – in some game modes, you need to capture and hold a certain area. Make sure to work together with your team to defend the area and capture it from enemies.

6. Destroy the enemy bases – in some game modes, you need to destroy the enemy bases. Choose the right tank and upgrade your stats accordingly to be able to destroy the bases quickly and efficiently.

7. Teamwork – work together with your team and communicate effectively to achieve your objectives and defeat your enemies.
